name: Exposure Directness appraisal for Tad Mood Wellbeing Quality Life bundle
summary: Accepted. All staged efficacy records are direct tadalafil evidence, not class-transfer claims. The bundle records dose, duration, daily-use pattern, indication context, and the 20 mg ETLAS-2 exposure separately from 5 mg ED/BPH exposure, and the claim does not infer effects from sildenafil, vardenafil, avanafil, or mixed PDE5 evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: Artifacts, findings, search protocol, and claim all mark the staged efficacy evidence as direct tadalafil.
findings.why_it_matters: This aligns the bundle with the PDE5 class-transfer framework and prevents silent cross-agent generalization.

findings.claim_or_issue: The bundle separates tadalafil 5 mg daily for 8-12 weeks in ED/BPH contexts from tadalafil 20 mg daily for 3 months in ETLAS-2.
findings.why_it_matters: Mood/well-being inference may be exposure-sensitive, and healthy-user low-dose daily use remains unstudied in this baseline.
findings.recommended_action: No correction required; keep exposure qualifiers attached to future mood/well-being synthesis.
